name: Molly Squidpiddge
title: Harbinger of Havoc

abilities.name: Serene Countenance
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: The Lost Speak
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for its + actions from models with an Abandoned token within 8".

abilities.name: Thorough Investigation
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 8" empowers a duel or drains a (-), this model may make a Scheme marker within 1" of that enemy.

actions.name: Disturbing Story
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (c) if an ally is within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: All the Pieces Come Together
triggers.text: Once per turn. When resolving, the target is dealt +1 damage for each scheme its crew has revealed this game.

triggers.name: Muwahahaha
triggers.text: An enemy model within 2" of the target gains an Abandoned token.

actions.name: Misfit Press
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives an additional raise if the target has an Abandoned token.
actions.effects:
Choose and apply one of the following effects, plus an additional effect for each raise, in an order of your choosing:

The Creeping Dread: Target gains a Distracted and a Slow token.

The Mind Unravels: Target declares the Interact action controlled by this model.

The Thing in the Fog: Move the target up to 4".

actions.name: "Jinkies! A Clue!"
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range.

triggers.name: Lost and Found
triggers.text: An ally within range may move 2" and declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: On the Case
triggers.text: Allies within (1)2" of the made marker gain a Focused token.

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Molly Squidpiddge' back='Molly Squidpidge'
extraction_notes: The '(1)2"' notation in 'On the Case' trigger is preserved as written - appears to be an aura range indicator followed by 2" distance
